pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to leverage Java 17 features or enforce Java 17 compatibility checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 17+ is discouraged and may lead to mismatched bootstrap classpaths; the release flag ensures consistent compilation against the target JDK APIs.
